name: Bank Manager Agent
description: Main customer service agent that routes banking questions to appropriate specialists. Can answer general banking questions directly and coordinates with deposit and loan agents for specific account queries.

skills.name: General Banking
skills.description: Answer general questions about bank hours, services, and contact information

skills.name: Deposit Account Queries
skills.description: Route questions about checking, savings, and other deposit accounts to the deposit specialist

skills.name: Loan Queries
skills.description: Route questions about loans, payments, and loan applications to the loan specialist
